narrative:
Liberty Twp 10 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,157 registered voters, with 65.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
